flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rhodes College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($50.9k → $57.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rhodes College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($50.9k → $57.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rhodes College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Rhodes College are 36% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($66.7k vs $48.8k).
